inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the user in kilograms for accurate calorie expenditure estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the user in kilograms for accurate calorie expenditure estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kullanıcının kilogram cinsinden ağırlığı, doğru kalori harcaması tahmini için.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht des Benutzers in Kilogramm für eine genaue Schätzung des Kalorienverbrauchs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids de l'utilisateur en kilogrammes pour une estimation précise de la dépense calorique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso del usuario en kilogramos para una estimación precisa del gasto calórico.

inputs.label: Exercise Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total time spent on the elliptical machine in minutes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total time spent on the elliptical machine in minutes.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzeit auf dem Ellipsentrainer in Minuten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps total passé sur l'appareil elliptique en minutes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total en la máquina elíptica en minutos.

inputs.label: MET Value
inputs.businessContext: Metabolic Equivalent of Task for elliptical exercise (typical range: 5–9, depending on intensity).

businessContext_i18n.en: Metabolic Equivalent of Task for elliptical exercise (typical range: 5–9, depending on intensity).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eliptik egzersiz için metabolik eşdeğer (tipik aralık: 5–9, yoğunluğa bağlı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Metabolisches Äquivalent für das Training auf dem Ellipsentrainer (typischer Bereich: 5–9, je nach Intensität).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Équivalent métabolique de la tâche pour l'exercice elliptique (plage typique : 5–9, selon l'intensité).
businessContext_i18n.es: Equivalente metabólico de la tarea para ejercicio elíptico (rango típico: 5–9, según la intensidad).

inputs.label: Personal Correction Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to adjust for individual physiological differences (e.g., efficiency, fitness level). Default 1.0 indicates standard estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to adjust for individual physiological differences (e.g., efficiency, fitness level). Default 1.0 indicates standard estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireysel fizyolojik farklılıkları (örn. verimlilik, fitness seviyesi) ayarlamak için çarpan. Varsayılan 1.0 standart tahmini ifade eder.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator zur Anpassung an individuelle physiologische Unterschiede (z. B. Effizienz, Fitnessniveau). Standard 1,0 bedeutet Standard-Schätzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour ajuster les différences physiologiques individuelles (par exemple, efficacité, niveau de forme physique). Par défaut 1.0 indique une estimation standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para ajustar diferencias fisiológicas individuales (p. ej., eficiencia, nivel de condición física). El valor predeterminado 1.0 indica una estimación estándar.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
